issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path.
Skill is vendor-locked to Blender, not applicable to other AI agents.

scenarios.name: build-stroke-with-thickness-modifier
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets more rubric requirements, correctly setting the GP_THICK and GP_BUILD modifiers and scene frame range, while Response A uses incorrect modifier properties and mode.

scenarios.name: array-stroke-with-noise-and-fill
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A provides no content.
